name: ethos
description: Use Ethos as a remote MCP surface for GTM prospecting, enrichment, tables, agent columns, campaigns, and cross-channel unibox conversations without local CLI setup.

interface.shortDescription: GTM prospecting, campaigns, and a cross-channel unibox.
interface.longDescription: Use Ethos through a remote OAuth-backed MCP server. Find prospects, upload company lists, source people, enrich contact info, create agent columns, build and launch LinkedIn, email, and mixed campaigns, and manage campaign replies in a cross-channel unibox without installing the Ethos CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use Ethos to find RevOps leaders at US B2B SaaS companies.
Use Ethos to enrich work emails for a people table.
Use Ethos to add leads from a people table to a campaign.
Use Ethos to build an email and LinkedIn campaign from my people table.
Use Ethos to show my campaign conversations and draft a reply.
